title: Reduce endless scrolling with Workflow app
excerpt: At the recent monday Partners Summit, SO many partners commented about their big, heavy boards and how frustrating it is to scroll back and forth. It is for EXACTLY this reason that we developed the Workflow app. The Wor…

posts.author: SariHoltz (Sari Holtz)
posts.cookedHtml:
At the recent monday Partners Summit, SO many partners commented about their big, heavy boards and how frustrating it is to scroll back and forth. It is for EXACTLY this reason that we developed the Workflow app. The Workflow app shows you only the columns, labels, and details that you need at the relevant point in your workflow, using the Workflow status column as a guide. You can also set required fields so that nothing is left behind when moving to the next step in the process, and custom permissions to ensure that the right team members approve every step of the process.

Use cases include:

Employee onboarding

Support and escalation

Marketing campaigns

Procurement requests

…and more

Watch this 60 second video to see how Workflow works: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ABp-5Fz4gWg
